overall.description: A first-person walk through a dusty, post-apocalyptic industrial wasteland in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077 aesthetic). The camera moves along a deserted highway beside a concrete flood wall, passes beneath a massive steel overpass, and approaches a power plant with cooling towers and conveyor systems shrouded in brown haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: deserted highway beside concrete flood barrier

events.description: approaching intersection with large metal overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the deserted asphalt road next to a tall concrete flood wall

entered.detail: tall gray concrete barrier with graffiti markings running parallel to the road
two-lane asphalt road with double yellow lines and scattered debris
large industrial steel bridge structure spanning across the road ahead
dry brown vegetation growing along the roadside

segments.scene_description: Walking along a deserted highway flanked by a massive concrete flood wall on the left. The air is thick with brown dust, and a large steel bridge looms in the distance. The environment is dry and abandoned, with dead scrub grass lining the asphalt.

events.description: turning left at the intersection to proceed under the overpass
entering deep shadow beneath the bridge deck as the sky becomes obscured

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and walking under the massive steel bridge structure

entered.detail: paved concrete walkway running beneath the bridge
massive concrete column supporting the bridge deck
modern street lamp with glowing orange LED fixture

segments.scene_description: Turning left to pass beneath the massive steel overpass. The environment becomes darker and more enclosed as the camera moves into the shadow of the bridge deck. Concrete support pillars line the path, and an orange LED streetlight illuminates the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial wasteland with power plant

events.description: exiting the overpass into open industrial area with power plant visible
industrial cooling towers and conveyor structures become clearly visible through the haze

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt path toward the industrial complex with large cooling towers

entered.detail: massive hyperboloid cooling tower emitting steam or smoke
elevated industrial conveyor system with red framework
large circular fan structures on the factory building
industrial facility with multiple structures and smokestacks

segments.scene_description: Emerging from beneath the overpass into a wide-open industrial wasteland. The ground transitions to dirt and sand. Large cooling towers and industrial conveyor systems dominate the left side, partially obscured by the persistent brown haze. The camera continues walking toward the power plant facility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate highway through a dark underpass and into a sprawling industrial wasteland. It begins by walking along a deserted asphalt road flanked by a massive concrete flood wall and dead scrub grass, with a large steel bridge looming through the thick brown dust. As the camera turns left, the scene shifts into the oppressive shadow of the overpass, where the environment becomes enclosed by concrete support pillars and the glow of an orange LED streetlight. The camera then emerges from the darkness into a wide-open expanse of dirt and sand, where the lighting opens up to reveal a persistent haze. Finally, the view expands to show massive cooling towers and industrial conveyor systems as the camera advances toward the power plant facility.
